one_time_description: Insurance proceeds received during the year (non-recurring)
economic_notes: Klahoose First Nation has significant investments in government business enterprises including Qathen Xwegus Management Corporation, Klahoose Investment Limited Partnership, Klahoose Forestry No.2 Limited Partnership, and Aupe-Toq Fisheries Limited Partnership. Forestry and range income of $6,835,988. Revenue sharing of $1,886,340. Road use agreement income of $291,541. Share of income from First Nation Controlled Entities of $9,168,601. Youth Trust Fund of $1,246,689 held in trust for youth (not on balance sheet).
notes: Prior year figures restated due to error in a First Nation Controlled Entity's financial statements; restatement increased 2023 long-term investments by $4,207,640 and 2023 annual surplus by $2,551,628. Four government business enterprises accounted for on modified equity basis with total investment of $57,766,582. Five segments fully consolidated. No schedule of remuneration provided in the document. total_government_transfers calculated as ISC ($2,150,968) + DFO ($242,647) + FNHA ($571,576) + Province of BC ($1,573,589) = $4,538,780. Loan receivable of $6,201,768 from Klahoose Forestry No.2 LP is a new financial asset in 2024. Prepaid expenses of $6,505,042 largely relate to forestry operations.
